name: bundle-cards
title: Lumelle BundleCards
description: Mobile-first product card section with two cards side-by-side on md+ breakpoints. Each card has a full-bleed image panel, price pill overlay, Playfair serif title, feature badge pills, and dual CTA buttons.

preview.reason: Imports app-specific providers (auth, cart, product data) that can't be mocked in isolation. Preserved as code-reference.
